overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban waterfront district. The player moves from covered pedestrian streets with towering digital billboards through tree-lined overlooks to an open beachfront plaza, ending at the water's edge with views of the ocean and distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered pedestrian street lined with towering digital advertisements and neon signs

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow sign with black NC logo on building facade
vertical digital billboard displaying 'WEAR YOUR MASK' advertisement
small food vendor stall with bright purple neon lighting and menu displays
tall modern building with reflective glass windows and multiple levels
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian street in a futuristic city, surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon signs. The path is lined with railings on the left and food stalls with purple lighting on the right, while other pedestrians walk in the same direction.

events.description: transitioning from covered street to tree-lined waterfront overlook with view of water

agents.ego_description: walking through dense tree cover with glimpses of waterfront and ocean visible through the foliage

entered.detail: mature leafy trees providing shade and partially obscuring the view
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront overlook
open view of the ocean water and horizon visible through the trees
futuristic buildings visible across the water on the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: Moving from the covered street into a tree-lined waterfront overlook. Large trees filter the sunlight and partially obscure views of the ocean and distant buildings across the water, creating a transitional space between urban and waterfront environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: street market with food stalls and digital billboards

events.description: returning to built-up street area with market stalls and large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past street vendors and food stalls while passing under large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing behind food preparation counter

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with 'IT'S BIG' text and product advertisement
temporary market stall with fabric canopy and fluorescent lighting
multi-story building with teal facade and yellow structural accents

elements.scene_description: Walking along a bustling street market lined with food stalls and dominated by a massive 'IT'S BIG' digital billboard. The architecture features a distinctive teal building with yellow accents, while vendors and pedestrians occupy the sidewalk.

events.description: emerging from street into open plaza with view of beach and ocean
descending wide concrete stairs toward beach level plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into open plaza area with outdoor cafes and beachfront seating

entered.detail: distinctive circular multi-level building with orange and black color scheme and rooftop structures
white fabric umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables and chairs
sandy beach area visible beyond the concrete plaza
wide steps leading down from upper level to main plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the street into a vast open plaza with a distinctive round futuristic building dominating the view. Descending stairs toward beach level, passing outdoor cafes with white umbrellas while the sandy beach and ocean become visible in the distance.

events.description: approaching waterfront railing and steps leading down to water level

agents.ego_description: walking across open waterfront plaza toward the ocean railing and wooden pier

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking toward the water

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade
calm ocean water with gentle waves and distant horizon
wooden dock structure extending into the water with support pillars
hazy silhouette of tall buildings on the distant shore across the water

segments.scene_description: Walking across the open waterfront promenade toward the ocean's edge. The scene opens up to reveal the water, a wooden pier extending to the right, and a distant city skyline across the bay. Approaching metal railings and steps that lead down to the water level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, neon-lit urban corridor into a wide-open coastal plaza. It begins by navigating a covered pedestrian street flanked by towering digital billboards and purple-lit food stalls, moving alongside other pedestrians. As the camera leaves the covered walkway, the environment shifts into a tree-lined overlook where foliage filters the sunlight and partially obscures the distant ocean. The scene then opens into a vast plaza dominated by a round futuristic building, descending stairs past white cafe umbrellas as the sandy beach comes into view. Finally, the camera crosses the open waterfront promenade toward the water's edge, revealing a wooden pier and the distant city skyline across the bay before approaching the metal railings at the shoreline.
